decks.notes: The main focus of this Mono Black Aggro deck is to quickly overwhelm the opponent with aggressive creatures and disruption. Utilizing cards like Dauthi Horror and Grim Lavamancer to deal damage, along with Mesmeric Fiend to strip away key cards from the opponent's hand, the deck aims to apply pressure early on and maintain control throughout the game. By combining efficient creatures with powerful disruption spells like Crypt Rats and Sadistic Hypnotist, the deck seeks to disrupt the opponent's game plan while continuously applying pressure, ultimately leading to victory.

The main concept of this deck is to quickly discard high-value creatures like Rorix Bladewing and Akroma, Angel of Wrath into the graveyard using cards like Putrid Imp and Careful Study, then use reanimation spells like Reanimate and Exhume to bring them back onto the battlefield for a quick and powerful attack. The deck also utilizes disruption with cards like Cabal Therapy and Unmask to control the opponent's hand, while using mana acceleration with Lotus Petal and Dark Ritual to quickly cast spells. The land base includes City of Brass and Underground River for mana fixing.

The main focus of the deck is to control the opponent's resources and disrupt their game plan using cards like Stone Rain, Pillage, and Wasteland. The deck also includes burn spells like Lightning Bolt and Grim Lavamancer to deal damage and control the board. Additionally, efficient creatures like Mogg Fanatic and Veteran Brawlers provide a threat on the battlefield. The deck aims to grind out the opponent by denying them resources and slowly closing out the game with its aggressive creatures and burn spells.

This deck revolves around locking down your opponent's ability to untap their permanents by utilizing the card Stasis. By combining Stasis with Forsaken City and various countermagic spells, you can stall the game while draining your opponent's resources with cards like Black Vise. The goal is to establish control of the game early on and prevent your opponent from developing their board, ultimately leading to a win through attrition or a combo finish.

The main concept of this deck is to quickly overwhelm the opponent with an aggressive swarm of Goblins. By utilizing cards like Goblin Lackey and Goblin Warchief to reduce costs and speed up the deck, alongside powerful creatures like Goblin Piledriver and Goblin Ringleader, this deck aims to beat down the opponent before they can establish their own board presence. Supplementing the Goblins are utility cards like Gempalm Incinerator and Siege-Gang Commander to help control the board and finish off the opponent. The deck also includes land destruction elements with Wasteland and Rishadan Port to disrupt the opponent's mana base.

The deck focuses on generating a large amount of mana quickly using cards like Cloud of Faeries and Lotus Petal, along with utilizing cards like Helm of Awakening and Sapphire Medallion to reduce the cost of spells. The goal is to draw through the deck with cards like Accumulated Knowledge and Meditate, while eventually casting Brain Freeze to mill the opponent's deck. The deck also includes interaction with cards like Chain of Vapor and Snap to manipulate the board state and protect its combo.

The main focus of this deck is to utilize the combo of Phyrexian Dreadnought and Stifle to quickly overwhelm the opponent. By countering threats and drawing cards with Accumulated Knowledge and other spells, the deck aims to disrupt the opponent's strategy while building towards the combo win condition. The inclusion of cards like Duress and Smother provides additional control options, allowing the deck to maintain pressure on the opponent while setting up for the game-winning combo. The mana base is optimized for consistent early-game plays and smooth mana curve progression.

The Angry Ghoul deck focuses on quickly assembling a powerful combo involving Phyrexian Dreadnought and Sutured Ghoul to create an unstoppable threat. The deck includes various ways to cheat creatures into the graveyard and then bring them back into play with cards like Buried Alive and Shallow Grave. It also features disruption and card selection spells to protect the combo and find key pieces. The deck aims to quickly overwhelm opponents with a massive, game-winning creature while disrupting their game plan.

The main concept of this deck is to control the game through cycling cards and utilizing powerful creature removal and board wipes. By cycling through cards like Spark Spray and Renewed Faith, the deck aims to maintain card advantage and control the board. With cards like Eternal Dragon and Decree of Justice, the deck can create threats while also having access to powerful removal like Swords to Plowshares and Wrath of God. The inclusion of Lightning Rift and Astral Slide provide additional control options and ways to deal damage to opponents while protecting your own creatures.

This deck focuses on utilizing Oath of Druids to cheat powerful creatures into play, while also controlling the opponent's resources with cards like Sphere of Resistance and Winter's Grasp. The goal is to disrupt the opponent's game plan while ramping up mana to quickly overwhelm them with large threats like Terravore. The deck also includes ways to handle artifacts and enchantments, as well as board wipes for dealing with wide boards. The land base is designed to provide both colored mana for spells and utility lands for added control.

The focus of this deck is to control the game through counter spells, removal, and card advantage with Accumulated Knowledge, Fact or Fiction, and Gush. Psychatog serves as both a win condition and a way to pressure the opponent. The deck aims to disrupt the opponent's strategy with Duress and make efficient trades with Smother and Ghastly Demise. The mana base allows for flexibility in casting spells and maintaining a stable board presence. Overall, the deck relies on careful resource management and timing to outmaneuver the opponent and secure victory.

The deck focuses on utilizing low-cost, efficient creatures and burn spells to quickly deal damage to the opponent, aiming to overwhelm them before they can stabilize. With a mix of aggressive creatures like Jackal Pup and Mogg Fanatic, along with powerful burn spells like Lightning Bolt and Fireblast, the goal is to maintain pressure on the opponent and close out the game as quickly as possible. The inclusion of cards like Sulfuric Vortex and Cursed Scroll provide additional reach and damage output, ensuring a fast and aggressive playstyle.

The main idea behind this deck is to quickly overwhelm the opponent with aggressive, low-cost creatures and direct burn spells. By constantly attacking and using burn spells to deal damage to the opponent's creatures or directly to their life total, this deck aims to finish the game quickly before the opponent has a chance to stabilize. The inclusion of cards like Repercussion and Sulfuric Vortex further amplifies the deck's focus on dealing damage as quickly and efficiently as possible. With a straightforward game plan and efficient cards, this deck aims to secure a victory through relentless aggression.

The deck focuses on quickly overwhelming the opponent with aggressive creatures and burn spells. By playing efficient and low-cost creatures like Jackal Pup and Mogg Fanatic, and combining them with direct damage spells like Lightning Bolt and Fireblast, the deck aims to swiftly reduce the opponent's life total. Supporting cards like Cursed Scroll and Sulfuric Vortex provide additional reach and damage. The deck's strategy involves applying constant pressure and finishing off the opponent with powerful burn spells for a fast win.

The focus of this deck is to overwhelm and pressure the opponent with a fast and aggressive playstyle. Utilizing low-cost creatures like Mogg Fanatic and Jackal Pup, along with powerful burn spells such as Lightning Bolt and Fireblast, the deck aims to deal damage quickly and efficiently. The inclusion of Ball Lightning and Blistering Firecat adds to the deck's early-game aggression, while cards like Grim Lavamancer and Sulfuric Vortex provide additional sources of damage. Overall, the deck is designed to apply constant pressure to the opponent and secure a quick victory.
